title: sphondylium lanatum
intro: Sphondylium lanatum, also known as Sphondylium martini, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and menstrual cramps. Sphondylium lanatum is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
